text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Admire Vega has injured herself during training,
so I accompany her to the infirmary.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: They told me not to move it until it's fully healed.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I knew something felt wrong, but I ignored it. And
now I'm faced with this disaster.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: But that still isn't a reason for me to be idle.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I'm really sorry, but I'm going to go running. My
training has to continue.
choice_data_list: I think you should focus on recovering for now.

Let's search for some safe exercises you can
perform.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I've got to train harder than anyone else. I have
no other choice.
choice_data_list:
You won't be able to run in any races at all if it
gets worse.

You won't be able to run in any races at all if it
gets worse.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: You're right... I know that. Still...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Admire Vega appears unconvinced but follows my
advice and rests up.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Admire Vega heads to the gym in the hopes of
training in a way that won't affect her injury.
However...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I felt a slight twinge... But it's nothing to worry
ab—OUCH!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I stop her from continuing, but her recovery ends
up taking longer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I tape up the injured area to strengthen support.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: It doesn't hurt. I think I'll be all right like this.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Thank you. I'll be fine for now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Afterward, we come up with a way to avoid
stressing her injury, and she manages to finish
training safely.
